name_en: ✨M13397 White & Color. Flap Wallet. New LV x TM Portfolio Sarah NM. A wallet paying tribute to Maison luggage, the 'LV × TM Portfolio Sarah NM'. The slightly rectangular shape features calfskin trimming, with gold screws decorating the corners of the front flap. The playful rainbow-colored letter pattern canvas is exclusive to the reissue of the 'Louis Vuitton x Takashi Murakami' series. The interior features 2 large compartments and multiple pockets with 12 card slots, which is also very attractive. 19 x 10.5 x 2 cm.
